message:
fix: remove output_schema=None workaround, FastMCP 2.14.4 handles union return types (bd-49kw)

FastMCP 2.14.1+ added _is_object_schema() which correctly validates
self-referential Pydantic schemas with $ref+$defs at root. For union
return types (anyOf), FastMCP wraps them in _WrappedResult to produce
valid type:object schemas. The output_schema=None workaround that
disabled structured output is no longer needed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
